# VYVE Achievements — Copy Approval

**For:** Lewis Vines (CEO, copy approval)
**From:** Dean — auto-generated from achievement catalogue, 27 April 2026
**Status:** All copy currently **placeholder** — engineering defaults. Lewis to replace title + body for each tier, then Dean runs an UPDATE batch with `copy_status='approved'` and only those rows get used by the live system.

---

## How to use this doc

Each metric below is a category of achievement (e.g. "Habits Logged"). Each tier within a metric is a milestone — earning it triggers a toast and a badge in the member's profile.

For each tier, please replace:
- **Title** — short, ~3–6 words, no emoji. Goes on the badge label and toast headline.
- **Body** — 1 sentence, motivational, encouraging the next milestone. ~10–20 words. No emoji.

Notes on ladder thresholds:
- Thresholds were set based on realistic engagement curves. If any threshold feels wrong (too easy / too hard), strike through it and propose a replacement — Dean will adjust the ladder before locking copy.
- 14 members on the platform have already retroactively earned 147 tiers (Dean alone has 53). The earliest tier of every metric is intentionally low (1) so even brand-new members get an early win.

---

---

## Approval workflow

When Lewis returns the doc with edits, Dean will:
1. Diff edits against the placeholders in the table.
2. Generate UPDATE statements like `UPDATE achievement_tiers SET title=?, body=?, copy_status='approved' WHERE metric_slug=? AND tier_index=?;`
3. Apply the batch.
4. Once `copy_status='approved'`, future re-seeds will preserve the copy (the seed SQL has `CASE WHEN copy_status='approved' THEN ... ELSE EXCLUDED ...`).

Until Lewis approval lands, the toast UI (Session 3) will not ship — placeholder copy is not member-facing.
